signals.npcLine: Crypto tides bleed red; shadows grow restless.
signals.questPulse: Market shifts spark uneasy calm among fixers.
signals.worldFeed: Digital assets shrink, fear whispers through neon alleys.
signals.clueEvent: Scarce gains hide in sprawling token graveyards.

signals.npcLine: RAVE and WOJAK pulse weak, signals fading.
signals.questPulse: Tracking token echoes; traders talk in hushed tones.
signals.worldFeed: Trending coins lose their glow under pressure.
signals.clueEvent: Crypto shadows blur in fading neon light.

signals.npcLine: AAVE and ASTEROID pulse with quiet volatility.
signals.questPulse: Unstable channels flicker; opportunity or trap?
signals.worldFeed: Sentiment sinks; few brave the volatile streets.
signals.clueEvent: Fear masks hidden gains beneath fractured code.

signals.npcLine: PIEVERSE whispers secrets in broken data streams.
signals.questPulse: Decode the fractured buzz; fortune favors the cautious.
signals.worldFeed: Market breathes shallow, players plot new moves.
signals.clueEvent: Pieces of the puzzle scattered in ghost markets.

signals.npcLine: Watch the shadows where fear breeds opportunity.
signals.questPulse: Wary traders double down on fading trends.
signals.worldFeed: Whispers of loss breed rumors of revolt.
signals.clueEvent: Crypto ghosts haunt the neon wastelands.
